parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(last_sync), '2020-01-01'::timestamp) as watermark FROM bi_sync_status WHERE source = 'main_db';
SELECT COUNT(*) as new_users, SUM(revenue) as total_revenue FROM user_transactions WHERE created_at >= '{{ $json.watermark }}';

INSERT INTO bi_kpi_summary (report_date, new_users, total_revenue, mrr, cac, ltv, churn_rate) VALUES ('{{ $json.report_date }}', {{ $json.new_users }}, {{ $json.total_revenue }}, {{ $json.mrr }}, {{ $json.cac }}, {{ $json.ltv }}, {{ $json.churn_rate }}) ON CONFLICT (report_date) DO UPDATE SET new_users = EXCLUDED.new_users, total_revenue = EXCLUDED.total_revenue, mrr = EXCLUDED.mrr, cac = EXCLUDED.cac, ltv = EXCLUDED.ltv, churn_rate = EXCLUDED.churn_rate;
INSERT INTO bi_sync_status (source, last_sync) VALUES ('main_db', '{{ $json.new_watermark }}') ON CONFLICT (source) DO UPDATE SET last_sync = EXCLUDED.last_sync;
